sections.paragraph:
Ἄτταλος, ου, ὁ Attalus, a Christian in Smyrna IPol 8:2. The name was common in Asia Minor; specif. in Smyrna: CIG 3141; 3142, 2; 3239; 3288, 1 al.

IPol IPol = Ignatius to Polycarp—List 1

specif. specif. = specifically

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 149
